title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 622.170 - Delegation of authority
text:
622.170.  Delegation of authority. — The division may authorize any person employed by it to do or perform any act, matter or thing which the division is authorized by this chapter to do or perform, except that no order, rule or regulation of any person employed by the division shall be binding on any carrier or any person unless expressly authorized or approved by the division.
(L. 1996 S.B. 780)
